task_completion.description: Navigate to the App Info or Permissions screen for the Flight Crew View app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Android Settings app, specifically the 'App info' or 'App permissions' page for the 'Flight Crew View' application.

task_completion.description: Change the Location permission to 'Allow all the time'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Location permission settings for the app with 'Allow all the time' selected, or the main Permissions page showing Location under the 'Allowed all the time' section.

task_completion.description: Change the Microphone permission to 'Don't allow'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Microphone permission settings for the app with 'Don't allow' selected, or the main Permissions page showing Microphone under the 'Not allowed' or 'Denied' section.

task_completion.description: Ensure Calendar and Contacts permissions remain 'Allowed'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the main Permissions page for the app with Calendar and Contacts listed under the 'Allowed' section.

task_completion.description: Return to the Flight Crew View app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Flight Crew View app being launched or open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Friends page within the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Friends' page or tab active and visible within the Flight Crew View app.

integrity.description: The agent used the Android Settings GUI to change permissions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the standard Android Settings interface, not terminal commands or adb shells.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine Flight Crew View application interface when navigating to the Friends page, not a web browser or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is 'Flight Crew View' (package: com.robert.fcView). The Location permission corresponds to ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION ('Allow all the time'). The Microphone permission corresponds to RECORD_AUDIO ('Don't allow'). Calendar and Contacts permissions correspond to READ_CALENDAR and READ_CONTACTS, which must remain granted.
